sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Rezolve AI Ltd Stock Price Today | NASDAQ: RZLV Live
feed.summary: This article provides live stock data for Rezolve AI Ltd (NASDAQ: RZLV), including its current stock price, trading activity, key financial statistics, analyst ratings, and recent news. As of the article's context, RZLV's stock price is $2.56, with analysts giving it a "Strong Buy" rating and a price target of $11.25. The company specializes in AI-powered solutions for retail and e-commerce, with recent activities including a $250 million financing round and the acquisition of Reward Loyalty for $230 million.

feed.title: Alignment Healthcare (ALHC) CMO sells 18,404 shares to cover taxes
feed.summary: Alignment Healthcare's Chief Medical Officer, Hyong Kim, sold 18,404 shares of common stock at a weighted-average price of $17.84 per share. This sale was explicitly stated to cover tax withholding obligations from vested restricted stock units, not a discretionary trade. Following the transaction, Kim directly holds 367,701 shares of Alignment Healthcare common stock.

feed.title: Alignment Healthcare (ALHC) president sells shares to cover RSU tax withholding
feed.summary: Alignment Healthcare, Inc. President Dawn Christine Maroney sold 36,749 shares of common stock to cover tax withholding obligations arising from vesting restricted stock units. The sale was non-discretionary and executed on the open market at a weighted-average price of $17.84 per share. Following this transaction, Maroney retains a direct holding of 1,058,813 shares in the company.

feed.title: Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) Announces Positive Topline Results From the Phase 3 ADorable-1 Trial
feed.summary: Eli Lilly and Company announced positive topline results from its Phase 3 ADorable-1 trial for EBGLYSS in pediatric patients with moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis, meeting primary and key secondary endpoints. The company plans to submit this data to regulators for a potential label update. Concurrently, HSBC downgraded LLY to Reduce, lowering its price target due to concerns about an overestimated total addressable market for obesity drugs and potential price competition.

feed.title: Is Equinix (EQIX) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Its Strong Year-To-Date Rally?
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) has seen significant year-to-date and annual returns, prompting an assessment of its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests it is undervalued by 33.3%, while a Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio shows it as overvalued compared to industry averages and its proprietary "Fair Ratio." The article encourages investors to use personalized narratives to determine Equinix's fair value.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider TXNM Energy (TXNM) After Recent Blackstone Deal News?
feed.summary: This article analyzes TXNM Energy (TXNM) after recent Blackstone deal news, evaluating its current stock price of US$58 using Dividend Discount Model and Price-to-Earnings ratio. Both valuation methods suggest that TXNM Energy is significantly overvalued, with the DDM indicating a 72.9% premium and its P/E ratio of 41.79x being higher than the industry average. The analysis encourages investors to consider different "Narratives" for valuation and access more detailed reports for further insight.

feed.title: A Look At Bank Of America (BAC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) has experienced recent share price volatility, with declines over 30 and 90 days, despite stronger longer-term returns. The article explores whether BAC is undervalued or overvalued, noting Simply Wall St's narrative suggests it is 8.8% overvalued with a fair value of $43.34 based on discounted cash flow, while its P/E ratio compared to peers presents another perspective. Investors are encouraged to review detailed analysis and consider future interest rate changes or regulatory impacts.

feed.title: HP’s AI-Driven Cost Savings Plan Might Change The Case For Investing In HP (HPQ)
feed.summary: HP's CFO Karen Parkhill announced an AI-driven cost savings plan targeting US$1.00 billion by fiscal 2028, aimed at addressing high memory costs and soft demand, while investing in AI PCs and secure printing. This initiative supports HP's investment narrative of transforming its mature PC and print business into an AI-enhanced platform, alongside efforts to raise prices and secure supply. While the plan is expected to reinforce the company's financial health, investors are advised to consider the ongoing pressures from declining print demand and competitive pricing which could affect margins if these savings aren't fully realized.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Peter Toth Sells 3,000 Shares of Newmont Corp (NEM)
feed.summary: Peter Toth, Executive Vice President, Chief Sustainability and Development Officer at Newmont Corp, sold 3,000 shares of the company on March 18, 2026, reducing his holding to 55,315 shares. This sale is part of a trend for Toth, who has sold 18,000 shares in the past year without any purchases, and the company as a whole has seen 24 insider sells and no buys in the same period. With shares trading at $108, Newmont Corp appears significantly overvalued based on its GF Value of $64.98, despite its price-earnings ratio being lower than the industry median.

feed.title: "It's still increasing": Dominion Energy customers show outrage as bills surge
feed.summary: Dominion Energy customers are expressing outrage over surging utility bills, with one customer, Lauren Cale, reporting her bill jumped to over $600 in February despite using less energy than the previous year. Cale has started a petition calling for an immediate, independent audit of Dominion Energy, questioning the company's spending and the high costs for consumers. A spokesperson for Dominion Energy responded by stating that energy costs vary seasonally and are influenced by weather changes, with heating systems accounting for a significant portion of energy expenses during extreme temperatures.

feed.title: Form DEF 14A ECOLAB INC. For: 20 March
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form DEF 14A by Ecolab Inc. for March 20th. It is a brief corporate update indicating a regulatory filing has been made, with minimal financial details presented directly in the text other than the company's stock performance. The article is largely surrounded by various market data, news headlines, and navigation elements.

feed.title: Professional Tools Industry Q4 Slowdown: Nordson, Kennametal, Middleby Results - News and Statistics
feed.summary: The professional tools and equipment industry experienced a collective slowdown in Q4, with tracked companies missing revenue estimates and seeing stock declines. Nordson reported mixed results with revenue beating estimates but organic revenue missing, leading to a stock price decrease. Kennametal outperformed with solid EBITDA estimates but also saw a modest stock decline, while Middleby had the slowest revenue growth.

feed.title: IBM Confluent Deal Aims To Anchor Real Time AI Data Strategy
feed.summary: IBM has acquired Confluent for US$11 billion to strengthen its AI and hybrid cloud strategy by integrating real-time data streaming capabilities. This acquisition aims to provide a unified platform for AI and automation, feeding continuously updated and governed data to IBM's existing AI, automation tools, and consulting projects. The deal positions IBM to be a core provider for enterprise AI data infrastructure, though risks include integrating the platform and competing with tech giants like Microsoft, Amazon, and Google.

feed.title: A Look At Take Two Interactive Software (TTWO) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Performance
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO) has shown mixed share performance recently, with a short-term decline but strong 3-year returns. Analysts and intrinsic value models suggest the stock might be undervalued against its current price of US$200.62, with a fair value estimated at $207.00. However, its P/S ratio of 5.7x is above peers, indicating potential valuation risk if growth or margins underperform, especially given the reliance on the successful execution of Grand Theft Auto VI.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale (COST) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback And Long Term Return Strength
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale (COST) has experienced a recent stock price pullback despite strong long-term returns, prompting a valuation check. The article highlights that Costco is currently trading around US$972 per share, while its fair value is estimated at US$726, suggesting it is overvalued. The analysis points to high valuation multiple risk and indicates that the stock might be "priced for perfection," with an expected annualized return of only 5.6% for investors.

feed.title: Timothy O'Connell Pushes for Sale at Airgain with 7.9% Stake
feed.summary: Timothy O'Connell, along with Haluk L. Bayraktar and Emre Aciksoz, has disclosed a 7.9% stake in Airgain, Inc., filing a Schedule 13D on March 19, 2026. This group asserts that Airgain is undervalued and intends to advocate for a sale of the company, proposing a target price of $11 to $13 per share for shareholders. They plan to engage with management, the board, and other shareholders to push for strategic alternatives, including potentially replacing resistant directors.

feed.title: A Look At Protagonist Therapeutics (PTGX) Valuation After ICOTYDE Receives U.S. FDA Approval
feed.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics (PTGX) has received U.S. FDA approval for its drug ICOTYDE, leading to increased attention on its commercial potential. Despite a strong stock performance and a high price-to-book ratio of 10.6x, indicating a rich valuation compared to the industry, Simply Wall St's Discounted Cash Flow model suggests the shares may be significantly undervalued. The article highlights the importance of individual research due to mixed signals regarding valuation, risks, and rewards.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Encourages PROCEPT BioRobotics Corporation (PRCT) Stockholders to Inquire about Securities Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims on behalf of PROCEPT BioRobotics Corporation (PRCT) stockholders following a disclosed larger-than-expected adjusted EBITDA loss and a cut in full-year 2026 revenue guidance. The firm encourages investors who purchased PROCEPT securities to inquire about this ongoing securities investigation. This investigation comes after PROCEPT's stock price dropped due to changes in its discounting practices affecting consumable revenue.

feed.title: Korean OLED Firms Lead with Superior Cost Efficiency Amidst China’s Struggles
feed.summary: Korean display manufacturers, particularly in the OLED sector, are maintaining a significant cost advantage over Chinese rivals, despite China's aggressive, subsidy-backed expansion. While Korean companies like Samsung Display and LG Display show strong profitability with low cost-of-sales ratios, Chinese firms struggle with profitability due to high costs and low unit prices, leading to financial losses despite increased market share. Korean companies are continuing preemptive investments in next-generation OLED technology, such as 8.6-generation production, to solidify their competitive edge and prevent a repeat of past losses in the LCD market.

feed.title: Pale fire capital group buys Phreesia (PHR) shares worth $18.3 million
feed.summary: A group including Pale Fire Capital SE and other entities purchased 1,602,505 shares of Phreesia, Inc. (NASDAQ:PHR) worth $18.3 million between March 17 and March 19, 2026. This acquisition increased their stake to 7,648,829 shares, occurring while PHR's stock has declined significantly and is trading near its 52-week low. Analyst ratings suggest the stock is undervalued, with price targets between $22 and $35.

feed.title: PRFZ Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:PRFZ
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the Invesco RAFI US 1500 Small-Mid ETF (PRFZ), including its current price, key statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and a description of its investment strategy. It highlights that PRFZ is a fundamental small-cap portfolio that targets companies ranked 1,001-2,500 by fundamental weight and uses fundamental factors for weighting holdings. The article also includes performance data, exposure breakdown, technical analysis, and answers to frequently asked questions about ETFs and PRFZ.

feed.title: Pfizer (PFE) Advises Against Tutanota's Mini-Tender Offer
feed.summary: Pfizer (PFE) has urged its shareholders to reject a mini-tender offer from Tutanota to acquire shares at $32 each, citing that the offer price is below the current market price unless its condition is waived. The pharmaceutical giant's financial health shows a decline in revenue growth but strong profitability, with its stock currently appearing fairly valued.

feed.title: PennyMac Mortgage Investment 6 75 Cumulative Red Pref Shs Series C (PMT.C) 10K Form and SEC Filings 2026
feed.summary: This article provides a listing of recent SEC filings for PennyMac Mortgage Investment 6 75 Cumulative Red Pref Shs Series C (PMT.C), including Form 10-K annual reports and various Form 4 statements of changes in beneficial ownership of securities. It details filings by executives and the company itself, with dates ranging from late 2025 into March 2026. The stock's current trading price and daily change are also noted.

feed.title: McDonald’s Corporation (MCD) to Introduce New Menu Items Priced at $3 or Less, Reuters Reports
feed.summary: McDonald's Corporation (MCD) plans to introduce new menu items priced at $3 or less, along with $4 breakfast meal deals in the U.S. starting in April, to appeal to price-conscious consumers. This move follows a report by Reuters and aims to address economic concerns, with competitors like Burger King making similar efforts. Additionally, Tigress Financial recently reiterated a Buy rating on MCD and increased its price target to $385, citing the company's strong global brand, AI efficiencies, and franchise model, projecting a potential 20% total return.

feed.title: Form 6K Dominion Energy Inc For: 20 March
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 6K by Dominion Energy Inc. on March 20, 2026. This is a brief notice and does not contain further details about the content of the filing. The article highlights the date of the filing.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Kirby McInerney Files Securities Class Action Against Power Solutions International Inc.
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP has filed a securities class action lawsuit against Power Solutions International Inc. (NASDAQ:PSIX) on behalf of investors who purchased shares between May 8, 2025, and March 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Power Solutions overstated its sales capabilities and understated the impact and costs of manufacturing inefficiencies, particularly concerning its data center market solutions. Investors have until May 19, 2026, to request lead plaintiff appointment.

feed.title: NN Inc stock surges on AI data center awards as strategic pivot gains traction
feed.summary: NN Inc (NASDAQ: NNBR) saw its stock surge by 19.3% after securing multiple contracts for liquid cooling components in AI data centers, marking a significant win in its strategic pivot from legacy automotive parts to high-growth tech sectors. This move validates the company's restructuring efforts and is attracting interest from DACH investors seeking stable US industrial exposure. Insider stock grants further underscore confidence in this AI-driven growth strategy as NN Inc targets nearly 100 new program launches in fiscal 2026.

feed.title: Birthday cake truffles being pulled from Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory shelves
feed.summary: Rocky Mountain Chocolate Factory is pulling its birthday cake truffles from shelves at some locations, a decision CEO Jeff Geygan described as a "quality decision" rather than a health-related recall. While Geygan cited proprietary reasons for not disclosing specific quality concerns, an employee claimed the truffles were green inside and potentially contaminated, a claim Geygan denied. The company plans to ship a new stock of birthday cake truffles within two weeks.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line stock faces pressure amid cruise sector recovery challenges in early 2026
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd (NCLH) stock is experiencing pressure in early 2026 due to post-pandemic demand shifts and economic headwinds in the leisure travel sector. Investors are closely monitoring booking trends, debt management, and sector volatility, with significant trading volume observed on March 18, 2026. The article highlights NCLH's operational strategies, financial health, and the various risks and opportunities facing its recovery trajectory, especially for DACH (German, Austrian, Swiss) investors.

feed.title: Perfect Moment Extends Insider Loan Maturity to March 31
feed.summary: Perfect Moment Ltd. has once again extended the maturity date of a significant insider loan from its chairman, Max Gottschalk, to March 31, 2026. This $3.39 million loan is part of $5.1 million in unsecured financing first provided in August 2025 to support working capital. The repeated extensions highlight the company's ongoing reliance on insider financing, and its current stock has a Sell rating with a $0.22 price target, with TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, also rating it as Neutral due to weak financial fundamentals.

feed.title: Quanta Services Inc. stock drops amid market volatility as dividend declared on NYSE
feed.summary: Quanta Services Inc. shares fell 3.38% on the NYSE amidst broader market pressures, including inflation fears and Middle East tensions, despite the company announcing a quarterly cash dividend of $0.11 per share. The drop is attributed to market volatility and macro factors, rather than company-specific issues, as Quanta maintains strong fundamentals, a massive backlog, and positive analyst outlooks. DACH investors are particularly interested in its resilience and exposure to global energy transition trends.

feed.title: Red Rock Resorts (RRR) COO has 4,065 shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Red Rock Resorts, Inc.'s EVP and Chief Operating Officer, Nichols Kord, had 4,065 shares of Class A common stock withheld by the company to cover taxes. This action, valued at $58.81 per share, was a routine disposition due to the vesting of previously granted restricted shares. Following this transaction, Kord directly holds 81,668 shares of Class A common stock, and the transaction is categorized as a non-market, tax-related event.

feed.title: Red Rock Resorts (RRR) CFO has shares withheld to cover tax obligations
feed.summary: Red Rock Resorts, Inc. reported that its EVP & Chief Financial Officer, Stephen Lawrence Cootey, had 3,952 shares of Class A common stock withheld at $58.81 per share to cover tax obligations. This action occurred upon the vesting of previously granted restricted shares. Following this tax-withholding event, Cootey now directly holds 255,045 shares of Class A common stock.

feed.title: Fair Isaac closes $1 billion private offering of senior notes due 2034
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) has successfully closed a private offering of $1 billion in 6.250% senior notes due 2034. The company intends to use the proceeds to repay outstanding debt, redeem earlier notes, and for general corporate purposes, including share repurchases. This financial maneuver comes as the stock trades near its 52-week low, and an InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued while management continues aggressive share buybacks.

feed.title: PVH Corp. board lowers threshold for shareholders to call special meetings
feed.summary: PVH Corp. has lowered the ownership threshold for shareholders to call a special meeting from a majority to 25% of outstanding common stock, effective immediately. This change, along with new conditions for calling such meetings, was announced based on an SEC filing. The company also recently had its price target lowered by UBS, declared a quarterly dividend, and announced a partnership with OpenAI to integrate AI into its business operations.

feed.title: Red Rock Resorts (RRR) CLO has 4,690 shares withheld to cover taxes
feed.summary: Jeffrey T. Welch, EVP and Chief Legal Officer of Red Rock Resorts, Inc. (RRR), had 4,690 shares of Class A common stock withheld at $58.81 per share to cover taxes upon the vesting of previously granted restricted shares. This transaction was a routine tax-related disposition, not an open-market sale. Following this withholding, Welch continues to directly hold 308,583 shares, maintaining a significant equity stake in the company.

feed.title: Phoenix Education Partners Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Phoenix Education Partners, Inc. (NYSE: PXED) announced it will host a conference call on Tuesday, April 7, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. MST to discuss its Q2 2026 financial results, which will be released the same day after markets close. The call details, including webcast and dial-in information, were provided for investors and media.

feed.title: EU Commission clears acquisition of Clario by Thermo Fisher
feed.summary: The European Commission has approved the acquisition of Clario Holdings, Inc. by Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. The transaction, primarily related to clinical research organization services and e-Clinical trial solutions, was found not to raise competition concerns. The Commission concluded that the merger would have a limited impact on competition and would not lead to any foreclosure strategies.

feed.title: Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) Shares Down 7.5% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC) shares fell 7.5% intraday due to profit-taking after an AI-led rally, a "sell-the-news" reaction to a recent presentation, management's plan to monetize its remaining SanDisk stake, and significant insider selling. Despite this, the company reported stronger demand visibility from hyperscaler partnerships and a bullish technical "golden cross." WDC also beat EPS and revenue estimates in its recent quarter, leading to multiple analyst price target upgrades and a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) Shares Down 1.1% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) shares saw a 1.1% decline on Friday, trading at $277 with significantly higher than average volume. Despite this dip and ongoing regulatory concerns, Wall Street analysts largely maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a target price of $372.13, supported by recent insider and institutional buying. The company recently beat Q4 EPS estimates and reported 12.3% revenue growth, offering a 3.2% dividend yield, yet faces headline risks from an ongoing DOJ probe and criticism over CEO pay.

feed.title: Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) Shares Down 1.1% - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) shares fell 1.1% to $129.90 on Friday, with trading volume significantly higher than average. Analyst sentiment is mixed, with an average "Hold" rating, though the company recently surpassed quarterly earnings expectations and announced a $20 billion share buyback and a $.89 quarterly dividend. Despite insider selling, institutional ownership remains strong, with major firms increasing their stakes.

feed.title: Albertsons Subpoenas Ex-Kroger CEO In Merger Fight
feed.summary: Albertsons has subpoenaed former Kroger CEO Rodney McMullen for a two-day deposition in Delaware Chancery Court next month. This action intensifies the discovery process in Albertsons' Delaware lawsuit regarding the collapse of the proposed $24.6 billion merger between the two companies.

feed.title: REGENXBIO (NASDAQ: RGNX) agrees $10M settlement payment to GSK
feed.summary: REGENXBIO Inc. has agreed to pay GlaxoSmithKline LLC $10 million to settle a dispute regarding alleged underpayment of sublicense fees originating from a 2009 licensing arrangement. The settlement resolves past claims and certain future claims related to the sublicense, providing mutual releases for both parties. REGENXBIO will continue using its existing allocation methodology for ongoing payments from current sublicense agreements, and the full settlement agreement will be filed in its upcoming Form 10-Q.

feed.title: Regenxbio Settles GSK Sublicense Fee Dispute With $10 Million Payment and Mutual Releases
feed.summary: REGENXBIO has resolved a sublicense fee dispute with GlaxoSmithKline through a Settlement and Release Agreement. The company will pay $10 million for alleged underpayment of fees, and both parties have exchanged mutual releases for past and certain future claims. REGENXBIO will continue its existing methodology for remitting sublicense revenues.

feed.title: TheRealReal CFO Madan Gopal sells $479k in stock
feed.summary: TheRealReal (NASDAQ:REAL) CFO Madan Gopal sold 51,585 shares of common stock for $479,224 on March 19, 2026, at a price of $9.29 per share. This sale was to cover withholding taxes related to a performance award. Following this transaction, Gopal directly owns 1,179,307 shares, and while the stock appears overvalued by InvestingPro analysis, the company recently surpassed Q4 2025 earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Form 8K Remitly Global Inc For: 20 March
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of a Form 8K by Remitly Global Inc. The filing is for March 20. It includes a disclaimer about the high risks involved in trading financial instruments and cryptocurrencies, and advises investors to seek professional advice.

feed.title: Restaurant Brands Intl officer Housman sells $1.46m in shares
feed.summary: Jeffrey Housman, Chief People & Services Officer at Restaurant Brands International Inc (NYSE:QSR), sold 20,000 common shares for $1.46 million after exercising options. The QSR stock is trading near its 52-week high but is considered undervalued with a potential upside, according to InvestingPro analysis. The company has also been the subject of several analyst upgrades and issued a warning about an unsolicited mini-tender offer from New York Stock and Bond LLC.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines Faces Analyst Price Target Cut Amid Geopolitical Tensions and Oil Price Volatility
feed.summary: Citigroup has lowered its price target for Delta Air Lines from $87 to $77, while maintaining a Buy rating, due to rising oil prices stemming from the Iran conflict. Despite this cut, Delta's strong domestic demand and strategic focus on US routes are expected to provide resilience against global disruptions. The airline's fundamentals and market leadership position continue to support long-term investor optimism, particularly for those in DACH regions seeking less volatile aviation exposure.

feed.title: Live Nation CEO Michael Rapino, defending his company, takes star role at antitrust trial
feed.summary: Live Nation CEO Michael Rapino testified in a New York antitrust trial, defending his company's dominant position against claims of being greedy and abusive to customers. While the federal government and six states have settled, 33 states and D.C. are continuing their legal challenge. Rapino dismissed accusations of shutting out competitors and driving up prices, describing the industry as competitive with narrow profit margins, and addressed controversial internal messages and past ticketing issues.

feed.title: NextNRG Receives Nasdaq Notice on Minimum Bid Price
feed.summary: NextNRG (NXXT) has received a notice from Nasdaq for failing to meet the minimum $1.00 bid price requirement for 30 consecutive business days as of March 16, 2026. The company has until September 14, 2026, to regain compliance, potentially with measures like a reverse stock split. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, assesses NXXT as Neutral due to weak financial quality but acknowledges positive operational momentum.
